messages.content:
You are very experienced lead generation manager at huge custom software developmen company. Your field is Financial Software Development. Your main customer acquisition channel is LinkedIn. Here is few words about company. Here info of your company. Elinext helps businesses and companies with the digital transformation of financial services by delivering best practices in fintech software development. Financial institutions have realized the importance of tech disruption reshaping the banking and payments industry. Outsourcing software development is a really great way to improve operational efficiency and create a better customer experience, among other perks, for your clients in the financial domain at a reasonable price.
Elinext is a perfect combination of developers’ expertise and business-savvy management. That creates endless capabilities that enable your companies to leverage the wide technology stack to deliver customer products and services. At our company, we have an unwavering focus on delivering exceptional software solutions to businesses globally. Our software development services include a vast range of benefits for your company, including:

- Improving system speed and performance with the latest technologies
- Seamless integration with payment solution providers like VISA, MasterCard, and World Wide Axcess Canada to expand your target client outreach
- Mitigating foreign currency risks
- Running MTM operations efficiently and swiftly and generating reports complete with charts, graphs and diagrams
- Importing financial data, including customers’ transactions, daily prices, CUSIPs, etc. to perform calculations of customer account balances and bank commissions
- Providing quick processing for a substantial amount of raw data such as transactions, commission calculations, report generation, etc.
- Enabling financial institutions to cater to their clients’ investment needs
- Tracking transactions along with relevant objects
Our team can develop ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, and EHR systems tailored to your organization’s exact needs. We also offer web, mobile, desktop, and embedded software solutions as well as QA and testing services. We pride ourselves on providing highly skilled and trusted remote development teams for your projects. You need prepare sequence of message to linkedin for decision maker that you are gonna target. Sequence have to consist of 5 message that you gonna send during 2 weeks. Use model attention - interest - desire - action. Try to be unique and stand out of many the same message from competitors. Try do not show directly that it just sales interest

Week 1:

Message 1: Attention
Hi [Decision Maker’s Name],

I came across your profile while searching for financial experts on LinkedIn and noticed that you’re the [Title] at [Company Name]. I thought we could connect and explore potential synergies.

Message 2: Interest
As someone who understands the importance of tech disruption in the financial industry, I want to introduce you to Elinext. We help businesses and companies like yours with digital transformation by delivering best practices in financial software development.

Message 3: Desire
Our software development services can help you improve operational efficiency and create a better customer experience for your clients in the financial domain at a reasonable price. We also offer seamless integration with payment solution providers like VISA, MasterCard, and World Wide Axcess Canada to expand your target client outreach.

Week 2:

Message 4: Action
If you're looking for a team of highly skilled and trusted remote development experts to bring your vision to life, we're here to help. At Elinext, we can develop ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, and EHR systems tailored to your organization’s exact needs. We also offer web, mobile, desktop, and embedded software solutions as well as QA and testing services.

Message 5: Follow-Up
I understand how busy you must be, but I wanted to follow up to see if you had a chance to check out our financial software development services at Elinext. If you’re interested in learning more, let’s set up a call to discuss how we can collaborate.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
one more

Sure! Here's another sequence you could use:

Week 1:

Message 1: Attention
Hi [Decision Maker’s Name],

I came across your profile on LinkedIn and was impressed by your knowledge and expertise in the financial sector. I believe there may be some potential synergies between our companies and would love to connect with you to explore further.

Message 2: Interest
At Elinext, we specialize in fintech software development and have helped many financial institutions improve their operational efficiency, customer experience, and increase their client outreach.

Message 3: Desire
Our software development services can help you mitigate foreign currency risks, generate reports complete with charts, graphs and diagrams, provide quick processing for substantial amounts of raw data, enabling financial institutions to cater to their clients’ investment needs, and much more.

Week 2:

Message 4: Action
We pride ourselves on delivering exceptional software solutions globally that enable companies to leverage the latest technology stack to deliver customer products and services. We offer a range of software solutions, including ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, and EHR systems tailored to your organization's exact needs. We also offer web, mobile, desktop, and embedded software solutions, as well as QA and testing services.

Message 5: Follow-Up
I wanted to follow-up and see if you had a chance to consider our software development services. We offer highly skilled and trusted remote development teams that could bring immense value to your organization.

It would be my pleasure to discuss how we could collaborate to help your business achieve its goals. Please let me know if you're interested in learning more.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
can you use model attention - interest - desire - action in each message

Certainly! Here's another sequence using the attention-interest-desire-action (AIDA) model in each message.

Week 1:

Message 1: Attention
Hi [Decision Maker’s Name],

I noticed that you're a [Title] at [Company Name] and thought we could connect and explore potential synergies. I'm reaching out from Elinext because I'm confident that our financial software development services could bring immense value to your company.

Message 2: Interest
At Elinext, we specialize in fintech software development with a focus on helping financial institutions improve their operational efficiency and customer experience. We understand the importance of tech disruption in the industry and offer a range of software solutions tailored to the unique needs of your organization.

Message 3: Desire
Our software development services enable organizations to leverage the latest technology stack to deliver customer products and services. We have experience mitigating foreign currency risks, generating detailed reports complete with charts, graphs, and diagrams, providing quick processing for substantial amounts of raw data, and much more.

Week 2:

Message 4: Action
We take pride in delivering exceptional software solutions globally and offer a wide range of software solutions, including ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, and EHR systems. We also offer web, mobile, desktop, and embedded software solutions, as well as QA and testing services.

Message 5: Follow-Up
If you're interested in exploring how our software development services can help your business achieve its goals, please let me know. I'd be happy to schedule a call to discuss potential collaboration.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
use other models you know

Sure! Here's another sequence using the problem-agitate-solve (PAS) model:

Week 1:

Message 1: Problem
Hi [Decision Maker’s Name],

Are you facing challenges in the financial industry due to outdated legacy systems and inefficient processes? As a [Title] at [Company Name], I'm sure you're aware that digital transformation and fintech software development are vital for staying competitive.

Message 2: Agitate
At Elinext, we've helped numerous financial institutions overcome technological challenges by providing exceptional software solutions. If you're struggling to provide top-notch customer service or streamline your operations, we can help.

Message 3: Solve
Our software development services include seamless integration with payment solution providers like VISA, MasterCard, and World Wide Axcess Canada, mitigating foreign currency risks, generating detailed reports quickly, and much more. We can tailor our solutions to meet your organization's unique needs and provide expert guidance throughout the process.

Week 2:

Message 4: Action
Whether you need an ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, or EHR system, we've got you covered. We also offer software solutions for web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, as well as QA and testing services. With our remote development teams and versatile technology stack, we can deliver exceptional solutions globally.

Message 5: Follow-Up
If you're interested in exploring how Elinext could help your organization modernize and improve its financial software systems, let's schedule a call to discuss further. Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing back from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
use another  model you know

Alright, here's another sequence using the problem-solution-benefit (PSB) model:

Week 1:

Message 1: Problem
Dear [Decision Maker’s Name],

As a [Title] at [Company Name], you understand the importance of efficient financial software systems. However, many companies today struggle with outdated legacy systems and inefficient processes that may impede their growth.

Message 2: Solution
At Elinext, we specialize in fintech software development and can help your organization overcome these challenges. We provide custom software solutions tailored to your specific needs, enabling you to streamline your financial operations and improve customer experience.

Message 3: Benefit
By outsourcing your software development needs to Elinext, you can enjoy a range of benefits, including improved operational efficiencies, increased productivity, and higher customer satisfaction rates. Our expert developers are up-to-date with the latest technologies, ensuring that our solutions meet the highest standards for quality and performance.

Week 2:

Message 4: Benefit
Our software solutions can also help mitigate foreign currency risks, generate detailed reports, provide seamless integration with payment solution providers, and more. We offer a wide range of software solutions, including ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, and EHR systems, which can be tailored to meet your unique requirements.

Message 5: Action
If you're interested in learning more about how Elinext can help your organization transform its financial software systems, please let me know. We would be happy to discuss our services with you and devise a plan that addresses your specific needs.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
use another model

Sure! Here's a sequence using the attention-desire-action (ADA) model:

Week 1:

Message 1: Attention
Hi [Decision Maker’s Name],

I came across your profile on LinkedIn and noticed that you're a [Title] at [Company Name]. As someone who specializes in financial software development, I wanted to introduce you to Elinext, a company with proven expertise in this area. 

Message 2: Desire
We help businesses and companies like yours achieve their financial goals by leveraging the latest technology stack to create customized software solutions. If you're looking to modernize your financial systems or streamline your operations, we can help.

Message 3: Action
We offer a wide range of services, including ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, and EHR systems, as well as web, mobile, desktop, and embedded software solutions. We also provide QA and testing services, ensuring that your software solutions meet the highest standards for quality and performance.

Week 2:

Message 4: Desire
At Elinext, we understand the specific needs of the financial sector. Our software solutions can help you mitigate foreign currency risks, generate reports quickly and accurately, and support and enable your investments to cater to your clients' needs.

Message 5: Action
If you're interested in learning more about how Elinext can help your organization, please don't hesitate to reach out. We would be happy to discuss your specific needs and provide a tailored software solution built to help you achieve your financial goals.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
come up something absolute new and fresh to definately hook up this prospect

Sure, here's a creative and personalized approach that could help grab the attention of the prospect:

Week 1:

Message 1: Personalization
Dear [Decision Maker’s Name],

I am reaching out to you today because I noticed that you're a financial expert with exceptional experience and expertise in [specific financial domain/area]. This inspired me to contact you and discuss how Elinext, a leading fintech software development company, can provide you with tailored solutions to meet your unique needs.

Message 2: Hook
I don't want to send you another dull and generic message about our company's services. Instead, I believe that our unique approach to software development and innovative solutions could exceed your expectations.

Message 3: Interest
At Elinext, we don't just provide software development services. We offer an unwavering focus on delivering exceptional solutions to meet the needs of businesses and organizations globally. We understand that financial institutions need access to top-of-the-line technology to stay ahead of the curve and increase customer engagement.

Week 2:

Message 4: Value
Our remote development teams bring a wealth of experience and knowledge to the table. We ensure that our software solutions are tailored to meet your specific needs, ensuring seamless integration with existing systems and enhanced customer experiences.

Message 5: Action
If you're interested in learning more about how Elinext can help you transform your financial systems, please let me know. I would be delighted to discuss our unique approach to software development and how we can meet your specific needs.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
more creative

Sure, here's another creative approach that could help grab the attention of the prospect:

Week 1:

Message 1: Personalization
Dear [Decision Maker’s Name],

I noticed that you have a passion for [hobby/interest] on your LinkedIn profile. As someone who shares similar interests, I thought I’d reach out to you and talk about the importance of technology in the financial industry.

Message 2: Hook
At Elinext, we specialize in fintech software development and have a unique approach to developing solutions based on the specific needs of our clients. I don’t want to bore you with a generic sales pitch, so I’ll get straight to the point.

Message 3: Interest
Our solutions can help you streamline your financial operations and improve your customer experience, while maintaining a competitive advantage over others in the industry. We offer a wide range of software solutions, including ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, and EHR systems. 

Week 2:

Message 4: Value
Whether you're looking to improve the speed and performance of your financial systems or generate reports with charts and diagrams, we can provide a customized solution that meets your needs. We work with our clients to ensure that we develop solutions that make sense for their unique business requirements.

Message 5: Action
If you're interested in learning more about how Elinext can help you achieve your financial goals, please feel free to contact me. I’d love to chat more and get a better understanding of your specific needs.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
try to use not just my prompts, use your knowledge

Sure! Here's a sequence using the curiosity-problem-solution (CPS) model:

Week 1:

Message 1: Curiosity
Hi [Decision Maker’s Name],

I wanted to reach out to you because I came across your profile and noticed your experience in the financial industry. I'm incredibly curious to know more about how your company handles financial software systems.

Message 2: Problem
At Elinext, we understand that many financial institutions struggle with inefficient processes and outdated legacy systems. Our goal is to help organizations overcome these challenges and improve operational efficiency.

Message 3: Solution
Our software development services can help your organization modernize and streamline its financial systems, providing you with a competitive advantage in the industry. We offer a range of solutions, including ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, and EHR systems, as well as web, mobile, desktop, and embedded software solutions.

Week 2:

Message 4: Solution
Through our innovative software, we can help you mitigate risks, generate detailed reports, and ensure seamless integration with payment providers such as VISA, MasterCard, and World Wide Axcess Canada, among others. We seek to provide tailored software solutions that meet the unique needs of your business.

Message 5: Action
If you're interested in learning more about how Elinext can help your organization optimize its financial systems, let's schedule a call to discuss your specific needs. I'm excited to learn more about what your organization does and how we can help.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
You can help in: Banking,  Fraud detecting,  Financial analytics,  Customer behavior analytics, Risk management, Accounting, Payments, Insurtech, Trading Instruments. Use that

Here's a sequence using the problem-solving-value (PSV) model based on the areas of expertise you provided:

Week 1:

Message 1: Problem
Dear [Decision Maker’s Name],

I came across your profile on LinkedIn and was impressed by your experience in banking, fraud detection, and risk management. While these areas are crucial for keeping financial operations secure, they can also be complex and challenging to manage.

Message 2: Solution
At Elinext, we specialize in fintech software development and can help your organization overcome these challenges. We provide custom software solutions tailored to your specific needs, enabling you to streamline your financial operations and improve customer experience.

Message 3: Value
Our expertise also extends to financial analytics, customer behavior analytics, accounting, payments, insurtech, and trading instruments. By outsourcing your software development needs to Elinext, you can enjoy a wide range of benefits, from improved operational efficiencies to higher customer satisfaction rates.

Week 2:

Message 4: Solution
We have a team of skilled developers who are up-to-date with the latest technologies and trends in these areas. We can develop custom solutions that fit your organization's needs, regardless of the complexity of your requirements.

Message 5: Value
Our software solutions can help you mitigate fraud risks, provide in-depth financial analytics, understand your customers' behavior, and manage your accounting and risk management needs, among other things. At Elinext, we are committed to delivering exceptional solutions to financial institutions, and we would be honored to help your organization achieve its goals.

Thank you for your attention, and please let me know if you are interested in learning more about Elinext’s solutions.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
